## Description

<!-- Describe what this PR does and why. Link related issues with "Closes #N" if applicable. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Feature (`feature/*` → `develop`)
- [ ] Fix (`fix/*` → `develop`)
- [ ] Chore / Refactor (`chore/*` or `refactor/*` → `develop`)
- [ ] Release promotion (`release/*` → `test`, or `test` → `main`)
- [ ] Hotfix (`hotfix/*` → `main`, back-merge to `develop`)
- [ ] Documentation (`docs/*` → `docs`)

## Checklist

- [ ] Branch name follows the convention for its type (see [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md))
- [ ] Target branch is correct per the branching model
- [ ] `package.json` version updated if this is a release or hotfix
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated with changes
- [ ] Documentation updated if behavior changed
- [ ] All CI checks pass
